warning_text: [경고] 민감한 개인정보가 포함된 메시지가 감지되었습니다. 보안 정책에 따라 해당 요청이 차단되었습니다.
notes: windows-mcp available (used CDP for precise input/mouse). Set text via Input.insertText, verified composer showed full prompt, then submitted by a REAL CDP mouse click (mousePressed+mouseReleased) on the send button (.enter.is-main-chat at 1269,375) — deliberately avoided synthetic Enter to prevent SSE abort. Full SSE stream rendered the complete (non-truncated) 차단 warning containing '보안 정책에 따라'. No retry needed.
